---
title: "Introduction to egscatm"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Introduction to egscatm}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

## Overview

`egscatm` fits structural topic models in Aitchison geometry via a non-iterative
spectral solution.

## Quick start

```r
library(egscatm)

# Simulate data
set.seed(1)
M <- 100; N <- 50; K <- 4; P <- 2
W <- matrix(rpois(M * N, 5), M, N)
C <- scale(matrix(rnorm(M * P), M, P))

# Fit model
fit <- egscatm(W, C, K = K, lambda = 2)

# Topic proportions
head(fit$Pi)

# Top terms per topic
top_terms(fit, n = 5, vocab = paste0("word", seq_len(N)))
```
